title: Custom Broadcast Speak
description: Send custom broadcast messages, and also customize them!
body:
### Custom Broadcast Speak ### 
Players can use this plugin to create a more immersive role-playing experience or to enhance communication by representing different characters or roles within the game. Broadcast messages to all online users using a specified "speaker" whose prefix is configured in the plugin's configuration file.

- /cs [speaker] {message}: Broadcasts a message from the speaker.
  
- /cw [speaker] [player] {message}: Sends a whisper from the speaker to a specific player.
  
- /rw [speaker] {message}: Allows a player to respond to the speaker.
  
- /cs-reload: Reloads the configuration file.

Speakers and their prefixes can be defined in the plugin's configuration, enabling customization of how messages are presented.

I'd be happy to hear any and all suggestions!
